name: mission_goal_phrase
description: The mission goal should include a specific phrase to maintain clarity of purpose.

name: execution_modes_direct_scope
description: Execution modes must make direct user scope binding before workflow defaults.
expected_substring: Direct user wording controls execution scope before workflow defaults

name: sprint_does_not_capture_copy_requests
description: Sprint workflow must not capture direct copy, text, or answer requests by default.
expected_substring: Direct copy, text, or answer requests do not enter this workflow

name: public_copy_artifact_first
description: Public copy canon should lead with evidence and artifacts, not sales positioning.
expected_substring: Lead with the artifact, not with a pitch
